audit_items.proof_trace: Property fails because remote_ctx_t* can be freed via direct close_and_free_remote() call (line 662) while still present in cache, causing double-free when cache later invokes free_cb. The cache entry is not removed before direct free.
audit_items.attack_scenario: When UDP relay server shuts down while active remote connections exist, remote_recv_cb may encounter NULL server_ctx and free a remote_ctx without removing it from cache, causing double-free during cache cleanup.
